title: Resource Switcher
description: Add a more convenient way to change resource packs and languages
body:
## Mod Introduction

The mod is a client mod and does not need to be installed on the server.

Multiple keys are added to the mod.

You can switch resource packs, switch languages, and temporarily disable resource packs with a key.

 

## Command

`/resource-switcher set/get/reset/reload/save`
